import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut total = 0
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match string.parse_int(tokens.get(i).ok_or(0)?)
  when Some(n)
    if n % 2 == 0
      total = total + n
    end
  when None
    total = total
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("sum_even=#{total}")
